channel.title: karlhorky/awesome-speakers Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: karlhorky/awesome-speakers Jul 5th - Jul 11th, 2021
item.description:
Nigeria 🇳🇬

Lagos

Adebayo Opesanya
Topics: JavaScript, Node.js, TypeScript, Testing, Community
https://twitter.com/mazibayo

Anayo Oleru
Topics: JavaScript, Node.js, TypeScript, Testing, React, Redux, React Native, Open Source, PWAs
https://twitter.com/AnayoOleru
